syntax_4737.creator: Ankoki
syntax_4737.title: Boolean
syntax_4737.description: Shortens statements such as true = true to just true.

en: Shortens statements such as true = true to just true.

syntax_4739.creator: Ankoki
syntax_4739.title: Can Cast Spell
syntax_4739.description: Checks if a player can cast the spell specified

syntax_4742.creator: Ankoki
syntax_4742.title: Hologram is Interactable/Clickable/Touchable
syntax_4742.description: Checks if a hologram is interactable, clickable, or touchable

en: Checks if a hologram is interactable, clickable, or touchable

syntax_4743.creator: Ankoki
syntax_4743.title: Is A Hologram
syntax_4743.description: Checks if an entity is a hologram

en: Checks if an entity is a hologram

syntax_4744.creator: Ankoki
syntax_4744.title: Location is Within
syntax_4744.description: Checks if a location is between two locations
syntax_4744.syntax_pattern:
%locations% (is|are) within [[the] location] %location% and [[the] location] %location%
%locations% (isn't|is not|aren't|are not) within [[the] location] %location% and [[the] location] %location%

en: Checks if a location is between two locations

syntax_4746.creator: Ankoki
syntax_4746.title: Slime Chunk
syntax_4746.description: Checks if a chunk is a slime chunk.

en: Checks if a chunk is a slime chunk.

syntax_4747.creator: Ankoki
syntax_4747.title: Spell Exists
syntax_4747.description: Checks if an elementals spell exists.

en: Checks if an elementals spell exists.

syntax_4748.creator: Ankoki
syntax_4748.title: Spell Type
syntax_4748.description: Checks if the spell is either generic, entity, prolonged generic, or prolonged entity.

en: Checks if the spell is either generic, entity, prolonged generic, or prolonged entity.

syntax_4749.creator: Ankoki
syntax_4749.title: Within World Border
syntax_4749.description: Checks if the given location is within the world border.

en: Checks if the given location is within the world border.

syntax_4750.creator: Ankoki
syntax_4750.title: Add Item Line
syntax_4750.description: Adds an item to the hologram.

en: Adds an item to the hologram.

syntax_4752.creator: Ankoki
syntax_4752.title: Build Paste
syntax_4752.description: Create's a pastebin paste. You should only call this once per paste. The developer key is linked to your pastebin account and found at this website: https://pastebin.com/doc_api#1

en: Create's a pastebin paste. You should only call this once per paste. The developer key is linked to your pastebin account and found at this website: https://pastebin.com/doc_api#1

syntax_4784.creator: Ankoki
syntax_4784.title: Glowing ItemStack
syntax_4784.description: Makes a glowing(enchanted with no enchant flag) item.

en: Makes a glowing(enchanted with no enchant flag) item.

syntax_4738.creator: Ankoki
syntax_4738.title: Can Break Block
syntax_4738.description: Checks if an item type can break a block.

en: Checks if an item type can break a block.

syntax_4740.creator: Ankoki
syntax_4740.title: Can See
syntax_4740.description: Checks if a living entity can see another living entity.

en: Checks if a living entity can see another living entity.

syntax_4751.creator: Ankoki
syntax_4751.title: Add Text Line
syntax_4751.description: Adds a line of text to the hologram.

en: Adds a line of text to the hologram.

syntax_4753.creator: Ankoki
syntax_4753.title: Create Hologram
syntax_4753.description:
Creates a hologram at the specified location with the id specified. The ID must be unique.
IMPORTANT: Holograms are not persistant over restart (for the moment), so make sure to recreate the holograms on script load!
syntax_4753.syntax_pattern: create [a] [(hd|holographic[ ]displays)] holo[gram] at %location% [with [the]] id %string% (to be (hidden|invisible) [by default]|) ([and] [to] not (allow|accept|show|translate) placeholders|)

en:
Creates a hologram at the specified location with the id specified. The ID must be unique.
IMPORTANT: Holograms are not persistant over restart (for the moment), so make sure to recreate the holograms on script load!

syntax_4754.creator: Ankoki
syntax_4754.title: Create Paste
syntax_4754.description: Creates a new pastebin paste. The ID must be unique.

en: Creates a new pastebin paste. The ID must be unique.
Deletes a hologram

syntax_4758.creator: Ankoki
syntax_4758.title: Enchant Item
syntax_4758.description: Add an elementals spell to an item

en: Add an elementals spell to an item

syntax_4759.creator: Ankoki

syntax_4760.creator: Ankoki
syntax_4760.title: Fake Damage
syntax_4760.description: Makes a player look like they took damage.

syntax_4761.creator: Ankoki
syntax_4761.title: Force Sleep
syntax_4761.description: Forces a player to sleep at a location as long as there is a bed at that location.

syntax_4762.creator: Ankoki
syntax_4762.title: Force Wake
syntax_4762.description: Forces a player to wake up if they are sleeping.

en: Forces a player to wake up if they are sleeping.
Refeshes the chunks given asynchronously.

syntax_4765.creator: Ankoki
syntax_4765.title: Register Elementals Spell
syntax_4765.description:
Registers a new elementals spell which can be cast.
The spell name and id has to be unique, or the spell will not be created.
IMPORTANT: The function has to return a boolean, and return true where you want the cooldown to be applied, and false where not.
syntax_4765.syntax_pattern: (create|make|register) a[n] [new] (generic|entity) [elementals] spell named %string% with [the] id %number% to run [[the] function] [on cast] <(.+)>([<.*?>]) with [(a|the)] cooldown [of] %number% seconds

en:
Registers a new elementals spell which can be cast.
The spell name and id has to be unique, or the spell will not be created.
IMPORTANT: The function has to return a boolean, and return true where you want the cooldown to be applied, and false where not.

syntax_4766.creator: Ankoki
syntax_4766.title: Register Placeholder
syntax_4766.description:
Registers a placeholder for HolographicDisplays only.
IMPORTANT: If a hologram is created before a placeholder is registered, you need to recreate the placeholder.
syntax_4766.syntax_pattern: register [[a] holo[graphic[ displays]]] placeholder %string% to run [[the] function] <(.+)>([<.*?>])

en:
Registers a placeholder for HolographicDisplays only.
IMPORTANT: If a hologram is created before a placeholder is registered, you need to recreate the placeholder.

syntax_4767.creator: Ankoki
syntax_4767.title: Remove Line
syntax_4767.description: Removes a line from a hologram

en: Removes a line from a hologram

syntax_4768.creator: Ankoki
syntax_4768.title: Reset Visibility
syntax_4768.description: Resets the visibility of a hologram to its default visibility.

en: Resets the visibility of a hologram to its default visibility.
Rotates a player without teleportation.

syntax_4770.creator: Ankoki
syntax_4770.title: Set Paste Format

syntax_4774.creator: Ankoki
syntax_4774.title: Set Paste to Expire
syntax_4774.description: Set when a paste will expire.
syntax_4774.syntax_pattern:
set %pastes% to never expire
set %pastes% to expire in (a|1|one) year
set %pastes% to expire in (6|six) months
set %pastes% to expire in (a|1|one) month
set %pastes% to expire in (2|two) weeks
set %pastes% to expire in (a|1|one) week
set %pastes% to expire in (a|1|one) day
set %pastes% to expire in (an|1|one) hour
set %pastes% to expire in (ten|10) min[ute]s

en: Set when a paste will expire.

Just a note this looks crazy in console, but theres nothing we can do about it:p (like this: "")

syntax_5456.title: Lasagna
syntax_5456.syntax_pattern: (lasagna|an Italian dish made of stacked layers of thin flat pasta alternating with fillings and other vegetables, cheese and seasonings and spices)

syntax_5458.description: Resets the world border of a world.

en: Resets the world border of a world.

syntax_5461.creator: Ankoki
syntax_5461.title: Show Mining Stage
syntax_5461.description: Shows the block break animation/stage to players.
syntax_5461.syntax_pattern:
(show|play) (mining|block break) (stage|animation) %number% at %locations% [to %players%] [(with [the] [entity] id %number%|)]
remove [the] (mining|block break) (stage|animation) at %locations% [for %players%] [(with [the] [entity] id %number%|)]

en: Sets the worldborder of a world over time.

syntax_5465.description: Returns all holograms created by SkJade.

en: Returns all holograms created by SkJade.
A single character.

syntax_5467.creator: Ankoki
syntax_5467.title: Cone
syntax_5467.description: Returns a list of locations to make up a cone.
syntax_5467.syntax_pattern: [a] cone (with [a] cent(re|er) [of]|around) %location%(,| and) [a] radius [of] %number%[(,| and)] [a] height [of] %number%[(,| and)] [a] density [of] %number%

en: Returns a list of locations to make up a cone.

syntax_5468.creator: Ankoki
syntax_5468.title: Core/Primary World
syntax_5468.description: Returns the main world, aka the fallback world.

syntax_5469.creator: Ankoki
syntax_5469.title: Exact Target Block
syntax_5469.description: Gets the exact target block of an entity.
syntax_5469.syntax_pattern:
%entity%'s exact target[ed] block
%entity%'s exact target[ed] block including ([only ]source|[any] [type of]) fluid[s]

en: Gets the exact target block of an entity.

syntax_5470.creator: Ankoki
syntax_5470.title: Formatted Number
syntax_5470.description: Formats a number over 999 to be in readable form, such as 2000 -> 2,000.

en: Formats a number over 999 to be in readable form, such as 2000 -> 2,000.

syntax_5471.creator: Ankoki
syntax_5471.title: Hardcore World
syntax_5471.description: Gets and sets wether or not a world is hardcore.

syntax_5472.creator: Ankoki
syntax_5472.title: ID of Entity
syntax_5472.description: Returns the id of an entity.

en: Returns the id of an entity.

syntax_5474.creator: Ankoki
syntax_5474.title: Image Lines
syntax_5474.description: Returns all the lines to make up an image. Max width is 150 and the image should be in the SkJade plugin folder.
syntax_5474.syntax_pattern:
[hologram] lines of [the] image %string% with [(a|the)] width [of] %number%
[hologram] lines of [the] image from [the] url %string% with [(a|the)] width [of] %number%

en: Returns all the lines to make up an image. Max width is 150 and the image should be in the SkJade plugin folder.

syntax_5475.creator: Ankoki
syntax_5475.title: Inet Address

syntax_5479.description: Gets/sets the login result for an async prelogin event. Please note this can only be set to "kick other", "allowed", "kick banned", "kick full", or "kick whitelist"

en: Gets/sets the login result for an async prelogin event. Please note this can only be set to "kick other", "allowed", "kick banned", "kick full", or "kick whitelist"

syntax_5451.creator: Ankoki
syntax_5451.title: Is Wet
syntax_5451.description: Checks if a player (1.1.0) or an entity (1.3.2) is in any type of liquid.

syntax_5473.creator: Ankoki
syntax_5473.title: ID of a Hologram
syntax_5473.description: Returns the ID of a hologram.

en: Returns the ID of a hologram.

syntax_5476.creator: Ankoki
syntax_5476.title: Item Cooldown
syntax_5476.description: Gets and sets the cooldown for a material for a player.

en: Gets and sets the cooldown for a material for a player.

syntax_5480.creator: Ankoki
syntax_5480.title: Nearest Structure
syntax_5480.description:
Find the closest nearby structure of a given structure type. Will not be set if not found. Finding unexplored structures can, and will, block if the world is looking in chunks that gave not generated yet. This can lead to the world temporarily freezing while locating an unexplored structure.
The radius is not a rigid square radius. Each structure may alter how many chunks to check for each iteration. Do not assume that only a radius x radius chunk area will be checked. For example, a woodland mansion can potentially check up to 20,000 blocks away (or more) regardless of the radius used.
This will not load or generate chunks. This can also lead to instances where the server can hang if you are only looking for unexplored structures. This is because it will keep looking further and further out in order to find the structure.

en:
Find the closest nearby structure of a given structure type. Will not be set if not found. Finding unexplored structures can, and will, block if the world is looking in chunks that gave not generated yet. This can lead to the world temporarily freezing while locating an unexplored structure.
The radius is not a rigid square radius. Each structure may alter how many chunks to check for each iteration. Do not assume that only a radius x radius chunk area will be checked. For example, a woodland mansion can potentially check up to 20,000 blocks away (or more) regardless of the radius used.
This will not load or generate chunks. This can also lead to instances where the server can hang if you are only looking for unexplored structures. This is because it will keep looking further and further out in order to find the structure.

syntax_4782.creator: Ankoki
syntax_4782.title: Roman Numerals
syntax_4782.description: Returns the given number in roman numerals.
syntax_4782.syntax_pattern:
[[the] value of] %number% in roman numeral[s]
[the] roman numeral[s] [value] of %number%

en: Returns the given number in roman numerals.

syntax_5482.creator: Ankoki
syntax_5482.title: Text Between
syntax_5482.description: Gets the text between two characters.

syntax_5483.syntax_pattern:

ticks of %timespan%

syntax_5484.description: Returns the locations to make up a giant donut/torus.
syntax_5484.syntax_pattern: [a] (torus|[giant ]donut) (at|around) %location% with [a] major radius [of] %number% and [a] minor radius [of] %number% [with [a] density [of] %number%]

en: Returns the locations to make up a giant donut/torus.

syntax_5489.description: Allows you to get and set the size of a world border.

[skjade] [world[ ]]border warning distance of %world%
[skjade] %world%'s [world[ ]]border warning distance
[skjade] [the] warning distance of %world%'s [world[ ]]border

syntax_5654.title: Create Laser/Guardian Beam
syntax_5654.description: Creates a laser/guardian beam. Does NOT show it. For an infinite beam, use -1 seconds.

syntax_4763.creator: Ankoki
syntax_4763.title: Interactive Hologram Line
syntax_4763.description: Makes a line of a hologram clickable(triggers the on hologram click), touchable(triggers on hologram touch),and interact(triggers on both)
syntax_4763.syntax_pattern:
(make|set) [the] line %numbers% of %hologram% [to be] [((un|non[(-| )])|)]clickable
(make|set) [the] line %numbers% of %hologram% [to be] [((un|non[(-| )])|)]touchable
(make|set) [the] line %numbers% of %hologram% [to be] [((un|non[(-| )])|)]interactable

en: Makes a line of a hologram clickable(triggers the on hologram click), touchable(triggers on hologram touch),and interact(triggers on both)

syntax_5659.creator: Ankoki
